channel.title: Machiroku - Japanese Restaurant
channel.description: Recent content on Machiroku - Japanese Restaurant

item.title: Contact
item.description: {{/* Mateix contingut que contacte.md en català - usa i18n */}} {{ .Content }}

item.title: Cookies
item.description:
Cookie Policy

1. What are cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you browse a website. They are used to remember your preferences and improve your experience.

2. Types of cookies we use

  • Essential cookies: Necessary for the website to function.
  • Analytics cookies: Allow us to analyze how users use the site to improve it.

3. Managing cookies

You can configure your browser to accept or reject cookies. If you reject cookies, some features of the site may not work properly.

item.title: Home
item.description:
{{/* Hero Section */}}

<h1 class="hero-slogan">{{ .Site.Language.Params.slogan }}</h1>

{{/* Estat del restaurant */}}
<div class="hero-estat">
  {{ partial "estat-restaurant.html" . }}
</div>

{{/* CTAs principals */}}
<div class="hero-ctas">
  <a href="{{ .Site.BaseURL }}{{ .Site.Language.Lang }}/reserves/" class="btn btn-primary btn-large">
    {{ i18n "fer_reserva" }}
  </a>
  <a href="{{ .Site.BaseURL }}{{ .Site.Language.Lang }}/oferta/" class="btn btn-outline btn-large">
    {{ i18n "veure_carta" }}
  </a>
</div>

{{/* Imatge de fons */}}

{{/* Plats destacats */}}

item.title: Home
item.description:
Authentic Japan in the heart of Barcelona Quick lunches. Calm evenings.

Hours

Monday and Tuesday 13:00h - 15:30h
Wednesday to Saturday 13:00h - 15:30h 20:00h - 23:00h
Sunday Closed
Make a reservation

item.title: Legal notice
item.description:
Legal Notice

1. Owner identification

  • Business name: Machiroku
  • Address: Carrer de les Magdalenes, 23 - 08003 Barcelona
  • Phone: +34 93 412 60 82
  • Email: machiroku@machiroku.com

2. Terms of use

Access to this website implies acceptance without reservation of the terms of use described in this legal notice. The user agrees to make proper and legitimate use of the website and its contents.

3. Intellectual property

All contents of this website (texts, graphics, logos, images, code) are property of Machiroku or third parties who have authorized their use. Reproduction, distribution or modification without prior authorization is prohibited.

item.title: Machiroku Restaurant
item.description:
Traditional Japanese cuisine in the heart of Barcelona

Since 2000, Machiroku has been part of the Gothic Quarter. Originally on Carrer de les Molas, we continue our journey on Carrer de les Magdalenes, just steps from where it all began.

At lunchtime, we offer a quick, balanced menu — designed to eat well without taking too much time.

In the evening, the pace shifts. The menu becomes more refined and elaborate, rooted in Japanese tradition and respect for the product.

item.title: Menu
item.description:
{{/* Secció de menús del migdia */}}

{{ i18n "servei_menu" }}

Monday to Friday from 1:00 PM to 3:30 PM

{{/* Grid de menús */}}
<div class="menus-grid">
  {{ $lang := .Site.Language.Lang }}
  {{ $menusData := index .Site.Data $lang "menus" }}
  {{ $menus := $menusData.menus }}
  
  {{ range sort $menus "ordre" }}
    {{ if .actiu }}
      {{ partial "menu-card.html" . }}
    {{ end }}
  {{ end }}
</div>

{{/* Secció de carta nocturna */}}

item.title: Privacy
item.description:
Privacy Policy

1. Data controller

  • Business name: Machiroku
  • Address: Carrer de les Magdalenes, 23 - 08003 Barcelona
  • Email: machiroku@machiroku.com

2. Purpose

The personal data you provide will be used exclusively for:

  • Handling your reservation request
  • Contacting you for matters related to the restaurant
  • Complying with legal obligations

3. Legal basis

The processing of your data is based on your consent and/or the execution of a contract.
